text: Nothing in this chapter permits any dealer to respond to the inquiry of a purchaser in any untrue or misleading manner.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3.6. VEHICLE SALES [9950 - 9993]
### Chapter 4. Disclosure of Damage [9990 - 9993]
##### § 9993

Nothing in this chapter permits any dealer to respond to the inquiry of a purchaser in any untrue or misleading manner.

*(Added by Stats. 1990, Ch. 1373, Sec. 1.)*

subsections.text: Nothing in this chapter permits any dealer to respond to the inquiry of a purchaser in any untrue or misleading manner.
